input.thought: Open official Cloudflare API, auth, pricing, limits, and MCP pages to verify buildability signals.

arguments.task: Open the Cloudflare developer API documentation and extract evidence from official Cloudflare pages about: API authentication methods, how to create API tokens or use API keys, whether the API is public/self-serve, rate limiting notes, API surface type (REST and/or GraphQL), breadth of products covered, pricing/access requirements, and whether Cloudflare provides or documents an MCP server. Also check official Cloudflare docs pages likely linked from the API docs for auth, limits, pricing, GraphQL, and MCP. Return the exact page URLs visited and concise quoted findings.

raw_result.description: Developer platform and network infrastructure provider with APIs for managing zones, DNS, security, analytics, Workers, and related services.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official docs state Cloudflare APIs use API Tokens or API Keys for authentication, and recommend API Tokens for most use cases; token creation is documented in the dashboard.
raw_result.gating_reason: Public developer documentation and self-serve credential creation are available from the Cloudflare dashboard without contact-sales approval for initial API use.

api_surface.breadth: Broad multi-product surface across account, zone, DNS, security, analytics, Workers, Access, and other Cloudflare services; docs expose both REST APIs and a GraphQL Analytics API.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Cloudflare links to an official MCP server from its developer docs and maintains the mcp-server-cloudflare GitHub repository.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Official rate limits page indicates a global REST API limit of 1,200 requests per 5 minutes per user/token, plus per-IP limits and GraphQL limits based on query cost; enterprise customers can request increases.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official docs explicitly separate REST API and GraphQL Analytics API, publish permission groups spanning many Cloudflare products, and link an official MCP server repository—strong signals of mature agent-facing platform readiness.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Access-tier classification is inferred from public docs and self-serve token creation guidance rather than a directly cited pricing/access page in the gathered evidence; some product endpoints may require paid Cloudflare plans even though initial API access appears self-serve.

result.description: Developer platform and network infrastructure provider with APIs for managing zones, DNS, security, analytics, Workers, and related services.
result.auth_notes: Official docs state Cloudflare APIs use API Tokens or API Keys for authentication, and recommend API Tokens for most use cases; token creation is documented in the dashboard.
result.gating_reason: Public developer documentation and self-serve credential creation are available from the Cloudflare dashboard without contact-sales approval for initial API use.

api_surface.breadth: Broad multi-product surface across account, zone, DNS, security, analytics, Workers, Access, and other Cloudflare services; docs expose both REST APIs and a GraphQL Analytics API.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Cloudflare links to an official MCP server from its developer docs and maintains the mcp-server-cloudflare GitHub repository.

result.rate_limit_notes: Official rate limits page indicates a global REST API limit of 1,200 requests per 5 minutes per user/token, plus per-IP limits and GraphQL limits based on query cost; enterprise customers can request increases.
result.notable_signals: Official docs explicitly separate REST API and GraphQL Analytics API, publish permission groups spanning many Cloudflare products, and link an official MCP server repository—strong signals of mature agent-facing platform readiness.
result.human_review_reason: Access-tier classification is inferred from public docs and self-serve token creation guidance rather than a directly cited pricing/access page in the gathered evidence; some product endpoints may require paid Cloudflare plans even though initial API access appears self-serve.
